message:
fix(vdbe): relax Halt assertion to debug_assert + handle empty programs

The hard assert! in ProgramBuilder::finish() broke 26 existing tests
that intentionally construct programs without trailing Halt (empty
programs, error-path tests, etc.).

Fix: change to debug_assert! (fires in debug/test builds, not release)
and skip the check for empty programs. The VDBE dispatch loop's own
debug_assert!(pc < ops.len()) already catches any actual out-of-bounds
access at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
